extension.summary: Sync Kodi playback with a friend~ no Hamachi needed
extension.description: NuiSync lets you watch together in perfect harmony! Host or join a cozy watch session to sync play, pause, seek, and stop between two Kodi instances. Share a short session code — no Hamachi, no port forwarding, no server hosting required. Auto-connects via UPnP with STUN-based session codes. Falls back to direct IP for Hamachi/LAN. Pure Python sockets, no extra dependencies~ Works beautifully with Fen Light, Cocoscrapers, and TorBox.

extension.summary: NuiSync repo~ Install and update NuiSync from here!
extension.description: The official NuiSync repository for Kodi. Provides automatic updates for the NuiSync watch-together addon~
